title: Simulation Result
description: A governed, auditable simulation result produced by the AW2 Fix Simulation Sandbox. Captures baseline vs candidate comparison outcomes for a remediation plan without modifying any production artifact.

simulation_id.description: Unique identifier for this simulation result.

remediation_id.description: ID of the source RemediationPlan being simulated.

cluster_id.description: ID of the source ValidatedCluster associated with the remediation plan.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this simulation result was created.

simulation_status.description: Overall outcome of the simulation. 'passed' = candidate improved target metric with no regressions; 'failed' = candidate degraded target metric or caused hard regressions; 'inconclusive' = insufficient evidence to determine outcome; 'rejected' = plan could not be simulated (ambiguous/invalid plan, unsimulable action type).

simulation_reasons.description: Auditable reasons explaining every simulation decision and outcome.

baseline_summary.description: Evaluation metrics for the baseline (unmodified) configuration.

candidate_summary.description: Evaluation metrics for the candidate (proposed fix applied in shadow mode) configuration.

deltas.description: Computed deltas between candidate and baseline summaries.

targeted_effect.description: Analysis of whether the fix produced the expected effect on the targeted metric.

regression_check.description: Results of regression testing against the candidate configuration.

promotion_recommendation.description: Recommendation for advancing this plan to AW. 'promote' = safe to advance; 'hold' = mixed results, needs more evidence; 'reject' = regressions or worsened target metric.

evidence.description: References to supporting evaluation, observability, and regression artifacts.

cases_run.description: Number of evaluation cases run in this configuration.

structural_score.description: Average structural correctness score across all cases (0–1).

semantic_score.description: Average semantic similarity score across all cases (0–1).

grounding_score.description: Average grounding/reference quality score across all cases (0–1).

latency_ms.description: Average end-to-end latency in milliseconds across all cases.

latency_ms_delta.description: candidate latency_ms minus baseline latency_ms. Negative values indicate improvement.

target_component.description: The component targeted by the proposed action.

target_metric.description: The metric expected to be improved by this action.

expected_direction.description: The direction in which the target metric was expected to move.

observed_direction.description: The actual direction the target metric moved in simulation.

overall_pass.description: True if no hard regression failures were detected.

hard_failures.description: Count of hard regression failures (metric degraded beyond threshold).

warnings.description: Count of regression warnings (metric slightly degraded, within tolerance).

eval_result_refs.description: References to evaluation result artifacts used in this simulation.

observability_refs.description: References to observability metric outputs used in this simulation.

regression_report_ref.description: Optional reference to a regression report artifact.
